title: Facilitator Guide — Day 14 — AIA as Your Business Platform
prepChecklist: Prepare platform pillars reference slide or handout
Have compensation materials ready for AFTER platform section
Brief mentors: platform first, pay second — always

sessionFlow.notes: Ten pillars. No product pitch. Platform vs employer reframe.
Participants rate pillars for their venture.
Compensation as fuel, not reason to join. Connect to FEC Financial Engine.

sessionFlow.activity: Why I chose AIA — draft platform rationale

debriefQuestions: Did compensation feel different after the platform discussion?
Which platform pillar would be hardest to replicate alone?
Who can articulate why they chose AIA — without mentioning pay first?
commonPitfalls: Framing AIA as employer instead of platform
Skipping platform evaluation before pay discussion
coachingTips: Connect compensation to Box 8 Financial Engine in FEC
